cards.title: Abandoned Cart Recovery
cards.body: Three-touch recovery across email and SMS, timed off Shopify checkout events, with copy that references the actual product left behind — not a generic 'you forgot something'. For {{situationDetail}}, we'd segment the flow by cart value so a $40 cart doesn't get the same discount ladder as a $400 one.

cards.title: Daily Shopify ↔ Airtable Inventory Sync
cards.body: Stock levels, SKU metadata, and supplier lead times stay in sync across Shopify, your 3PL, and the Airtable ops board the team actually uses. Low-stock thresholds fire a Slack alert with a pre-filled reorder draft so purchasing takes 30 seconds instead of an afternoon.
cards.metric: ~8 hours/week back for ops; near-zero oversold SKUs

cards.title: Customer Service Triage
cards.body: Zendesk and Gorgias tickets get auto-classified — order status, return, product question, fraud — and the first two categories get drafted replies from order data before a human even opens the ticket. Agents approve or edit; complex cases route straight to senior staff.
cards.metric: Median first-reply time from 4h to 20 min

ctaLine: Typical build is 2–4 weeks for a DTC brand doing $1M–$20M/yr. Book a call — bring your Shopify metrics and we'll estimate recovery $ in the first 20 minutes.
